claims.name: Finite explicit representation capacity of FARA
claims.maximum_supported_scope: project-authored W0-W3 constructions provide one fixed finite FARA schema, target-only recovery, semantics, coherence, machinery accounting, uniformity, composition, and witness assembly for frozen S_core before W4 and W5
claims.primary_resolution_mode: OBS-SC-010 plus W5 scoped representation theorem or formal obstruction
claims.required_next_test: complete W4, resolve W3.5, and assemble the strongest bounded theorem or obstruction
claims.supporting_validation: bounded executable corroboration mechanization independent review and baseline comparison
claims.falsification_condition: a frozen S_core object lacks an admissible witness or W4 exposes a valid countermodel

claims.name: Existence of a representation-independent universal structure of reasoning
claims.maximum_supported_scope: none; THM-US-TARGET-001, GREL-001, RCS-001, and the candidate registry are frozen prospectively but unexecuted
claims.primary_resolution_mode: architecture-neutral existence, invariance, discrimination, reconstruction, equivalence, minimality, or no-go theorem
claims.required_next_test: execute W3.5 factorization, positive/contrast scope, candidate ablations, and alternative reconstructions
claims.supporting_validation: mechanization independent review bounded exhaustive search and adversarial countermodel search
claims.falsification_condition: an admitted reasoning object lacks every candidate kernel, a valid reconstruction removes the candidate, or no single nontrivial kernel exists under the frozen assumptions
nonclaims: the current primitive set is necessary

claims.name: Existence of a common reasoning structure
claims.maximum_supported_scope: one fixed FARA interface and complete finite construction/recovery witness package are proved for every frozen S_core source before formal negative controls and theorem assembly
claims.primary_resolution_mode: existence proof or formal impossibility or countermodel over a frozen source class
claims.required_next_test: execute OBS-SC-010, resolve W3.5 specificity and factorization, then assemble W5
claims.supporting_validation: bounded model search proof-assistant verification and independent proof review
claims.falsification_condition: a formal in-scope incompatibility showing no registered witness can satisfy the remaining obligations
nonclaims: construction lemmas alone establish common-schema existence

claims.name: FAR bounded representational sufficiency
claims.maximum_supported_scope: all 24 finite S_core construction lemmas are proved including target-only recovery semantic agreement coherence machinery uniformity composition and typed witness assembly; Nontrivial, W3.5, and W5 remain unresolved
claims.primary_resolution_mode: scoped faithful-representation theorem or formal countermodel
claims.required_next_test: execute NC-01 through NC-10, W3.5 factorization and specificity, and W5 assembly
claims.supporting_validation: formal negative controls mechanization bounded reference implementations generic-baseline comparison and independent review
claims.falsification_condition: an in-scope source object admits no witness under the frozen obligations

claims.name: FAR universality
claims.maximum_supported_scope: none; W3 is a bounded finite S_core representation construction and the universal-structure discovery target is unexecuted
claims.primary_resolution_mode: formal theorem quantified over an independently defined source class or formal countermodel
claims.required_next_test: execute W3.5, the reasoning/contrast scope, representation-invariance tests, and then assess extension beyond S_core
claims.supporting_validation: adversarial holdouts boundary discovery mechanization independent review and alternative-vocabulary reconstruction
claims.falsification_condition: one genuine in-scope countermodel or valid architecture-neutral reconstruction defeating the candidate claim
nonclaims: an S_core theorem proves S_IRD universality

claims.name: Necessity of FAR primitives
claims.primary_resolution_mode: primitive lower-bound or independence proof over a declared reconstruction class
claims.required_next_test: execute candidate ablation and alternative reconstruction under THM-US-TARGET-001 after freezing the reconstruction class
claims.supporting_validation: registered ablations hidden-reintroduction audits and generic-baseline factorization
claims.falsification_condition: a valid general construction omits the tested primitive without equivalent reintroduction

claims.name: FAR minimality
claims.primary_resolution_mode: minimality lower-bound uniqueness or no-minimum theorem over a declared candidate universe
claims.required_next_test: freeze candidate universe equivalence and cost only after W3.5 classifies FARA against the generic baseline
claims.supporting_validation: full-cost Pareto comparison bounded exhaustive search and equivalence proofs
claims.falsification_condition: a strictly simpler admissible equivalent structure or proof that no minimum exists
nonclaims: finite competitor comparison establishes global minimality

claims.name: FAR imposes nontrivial representational constraints
claims.maximum_supported_scope: W1-W3 prove preservation reflection target-only recovery semantic agreement coherence complete machinery accounting uniformity and composition; the registered formal negative-control family and generic-baseline comparison remain unresolved
claims.required_next_test: prove each negative control fails for the registered structural reason and determine whether the same constraints are generic or FARA-specific
claims.supporting_validation: adversarial reference mutations and generic-baseline factorization
claims.falsification_condition: a structurally unfaithful encoding passes the frozen representation relation without counted commitment or the same result is obtained by an unconstrained generic baseline
nonclaims: refuting OBS-SC-002 through OBS-SC-009 proves Nontrivial

claims.name: FAR comparative economy
claims.primary_resolution_mode: formal equivalence classes and declared cost relations supplemented by full-cost Pareto analysis
claims.required_next_test: execute W3.5 factorization and freeze a cost preorder before any economy claim
claims.supporting_validation: canonical full-cost experiments and machinery-ledger comparison
claims.falsification_condition: FAR is dominated or depends on uncounted machinery

claims.name: Independent verification and replication
claims.maximum_supported_scope: project-authored W0-W3 proofs with bounded executable corroboration and internal implementation robustness
claims.primary_resolution_mode: separate independent proof-review and empirical-replication records
claims.required_next_test: obtain independent reconstruction and proof-assistant replay of W0-W3 and later theorem packages
claims.supporting_validation: external countermodel search and independent replication
claims.falsification_condition: qualified reviewers identify a valid proof defect

claim_dimensions.theorem_status: whether a formal claim is proved refuted bounded or unresolved
claim_dimensions.mechanization_status: whether the formal artifact is machine checked and under which trusted assumptions
claim_dimensions.independent_proof_review_status: whether independent reviewers reconstructed or challenged the proof
claim_dimensions.empirical_replication_status: whether frozen evaluations were independently reproduced
claim_dimensions.application_status: whether implementations or domains satisfy the stated bounded contract
claim_dimensions.research_track: REP representation, USD universal discovery, ADJ adjudication, or ASSURANCE
